Interface Info

All Superinterfaces:
Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi20Info, AsyncApi21Info, AsyncApi22Info, AsyncApi23Info, AsyncApi24Info, AsyncApi25Info, AsyncApi26Info, AsyncApi2xInfo, AsyncApi30Info, AsyncApi31Info, AsyncApi3xInfo, AsyncApiInfo, OpenApi20Info, OpenApi2xInfo, OpenApi30Info, OpenApi31Info, OpenApi32Info, OpenApi3xInfo, OpenApiInfo, OpenRpc13Info, OpenRpc14Info, OpenRpc1xInfo, OpenRpcInfo
All Known Implementing Classes:
